usage.background: Use #F2F0E9 (Bone) as the global page background. Never use pure white for the page.
usage.cards: Use #FFFFFF (White) for cards to create lift against the bone background.
usage.primary_action: Use Deep Evergreen (#2E4033) for primary buttons and active states.
usage.call_to_action: Use International Orange (#E35205) SPARINGLY for high-priority actions or 'Craving' cues.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-secondary/50 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-border/40 shadow-sm p-6 md:p-8 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.habit_card: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-xl border-l-4 border-l-primary shadow-sm hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-lg border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring

textures.grain: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay with mix-blend-mode: overlay and opacity-30 on the main background to give it paper-like texture.

animation.micro: Use framer-motion for scale taps (0.95) on checkmarks.
animation.habit_completion: Confetti explosion or checkmark path drawing animation.

images.alt: Hand placing architectural roof - Building Habits

universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Implement the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette rigidly. No default blue.
Use generous spacing (p-8, p-12) to create breathing room.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Fontshare CDN link to the index.html head immediately.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette (Bone, Deep Evergreen, International Orange) and font families.
3. CREATE LAYOUT: Build a 'DashboardLayout' using the Sidebar + Header pattern, but styled with the 'Organic' aesthetic (Bone background).
4. BUILD COMPONENTS: Create a reusable 'HabitCard' component that supports the 'Atomic Habits' properties (Cue, Craving, Response, Reward).
6. ANIMATION: Use framer-motion for page transitions and micro-interactions (especially the checkmark).
7. DATA: Use the provided category images for the 'Create Habit' category selection grid.
8. CHARTS: Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts) but style them with the brand colors (#2E4033, #E35205).
